DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to Open court Mr. Ronald Scott Kravitz informs the clerk they did not receive a notice to contest and appears in an abundance of caution. Counsel is released.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs PHUONG THANH, and PHAVANTHA MAO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendants Phuong Thanh and Phavantha Mao's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
